title: GetResponse vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse and Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
h1: GetResponse vs Omnisend: Complete Feature & Pricing Comparison
intro: GetResponse and Omnisend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. GetResponse excels for course creators and webinar hosts, while Omnisend specializes in e-commerce with integrated SMS and push notifications. This comparison will help you choose the right platform for your marketing strategy.
choose_a_if: You're an online course creator or webinar host needing all-in-one tools
You want a larger free tier with 500 contacts included
You need landing page and conversion funnel builders built-in
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and need SMS + email marketing together
You want better customer reviews (4.6 Trustpilot vs 3.7)
You prefer lower entry pricing at $16/month and advanced segmentation

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Omnisend has higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.5 G2, 4.6 Trustpilot) and better features for e-commerce with SMS and push notifications. GetResponse is superior for online course creators and webinar hosts who need more comprehensive content delivery tools.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend starts at $16/month compared to GetResponse's $19/month, making it $3 cheaper monthly. However, GetResponse offers a larger free tier with 500 contacts versus Omnisend's 250, which may be better value if you're just starting out.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email campaigns. Most email marketing tools support CSV imports, making migration straightforward. However, you may lose automation workflows and SMS functionality if switching from Omnisend.
